These structural results yield four direct consequences: linear-time fringe computation, a validity certificate guaranteeing that every fringe-guided recommendation is a structurally sound next step, sub-path optimality for dynamic-programming path generation, and provably existing structural explanations for every recommendation. Building on these foundations, we specify the Exploration Space Recommender System (ESRS) -- a memoized dynamic program over the exploration lattice, a Bayesian state estimator with beam approximation and EM parameter learning, an online feedback loop enforcing the downward-closure invariant, an incremental surmise-relation inference pipeline, and three cold-start strategies, the structural one being the only approach in the literature to provide a formal validity guarantee conditional on the correctness of the inferred surmise relation. All results are established through proof and illustrated on a fully traced five-POI numerical example.

</details>


### [377] [T-REX: Transformer-Based Category Sequence Generation for Grocery Basket Recommendation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06631)
*Soroush Mokhtari,Muhammad Tayyab Asif,Sergiy Zubatiy*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: T-REX：针对在线杂货购物的新型Transformer架构，通过捕捉短期购物篮依赖和长期用户偏好，生成个性化品类级推荐，解决了重复购买模式和复杂商品关系带来的挑战。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在线杂货购物存在独特的推荐挑战：重复购买模式、购物篮内复杂商品关系、需要同时捕捉互补商品关联和跨购物会话的时间依赖。传统推荐方法（如BERT4Rec）在下一购物篮生成中存在信息泄露问题，不适合杂货购物场景。

Method: 提出T-REX Transformer架构，包含三个关键创新：1）针对稀疏购物模式的动态序列分割采样策略；2）适应时间模式的自适应位置编码方案；3）降低维度同时保持推荐质量的品类级建模方法。采用因果掩码方法更好地对齐购物篮生成的序列性质。

Result: 在大规模杂货离线数据和在线A/B测试中，T-REX相比现有系统表现出显著改进，证明了其在下一购物篮预测中的准确性和有效性。

Conclusion: T-REX成功解决了在线杂货推荐中的独特挑战，通过创新的Transformer架构设计，在捕捉短期依赖和长期偏好方面优于传统方法，为杂货购物场景提供了有效的个性化推荐解决方案。

Abstract: Online grocery shopping presents unique challenges for sequential recommendations due to repetitive purchase patterns and complex item relationships within the baskets. Unlike traditional e-commerce, grocery recommendations must capture both complementary item associations and temporal dependencies across shopping sessions. To address these challenges in Amazon's online grocery business, we propose T-REX, a novel transformer architecture that generates personalized category-level suggestions by learning both short-term basket dependencies and long-term user preferences. Our approach introduces three key innovations: (1) an efficient sampling strategy utilizing dynamic sequence splitting for sparse shopping patterns, (2) an adaptive positional encoding scheme for temporal patterns, and (3) a category-level modeling approach that reduces dimensionality while maintaining recommendation quality. Although masked language modeling techniques like BERT4Rec excel at capturing item relations, they prove less suitable for next basket generation due to information leakage issues. In contrast, T-REX's causal masking approach better aligns with the sequential nature of basket generation, enabling more accurate next-basket predictions. Experiments on large-scale grocery offline data and online A/B tests show significant improvement over existing systems.

</details>


### [378] [Approximate Nearest Neighbor Search for Modern AI: A Projection-Augmented Graph Approach](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06660)
*Kejing Lu,Zhenpeng Pan,Jianbin Qin,Yoshiharu Ishikawa,Chuan Xiao*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: PAG（投影增强图）是一个新的近似最近邻搜索框架，通过将投影技术集成到图索引中，满足现代AI应用的六大需求：高查询效率、快速索引、低内存占用、高维可扩展性、检索规模鲁棒性和在线插入支持。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有ANNS解决方案主要优化查询效率，但未能满足现代AI工作负载的实际需求。现代应用需要同时满足六大关键需求：高查询效率、快速索引、低内存占用、高维可扩展性、不同检索规模的鲁棒性以及在线插入支持。

Method: 提出投影增强图（PAG）框架，将投影技术集成到图索引中。通过投影统计测试指导的精确距离与近似距离之间的非对称比较，减少不必要的精确距离计算。设计了三个关键组件并统一到图索引中，优化索引和搜索过程。

Result: 在六个现代数据集上的实验表明，PAG在查询每秒（QPS）-召回率性能上持续优于现有方法，比HNSW快达5倍，同时提供快速索引速度和适中的内存占用。PAG在高维度和检索规模增加时保持鲁棒性，并天然支持在线插入。

Conclusion: PAG是一个全面的ANNS框架，通过创新的投影增强图设计，同时满足了现代AI应用的六大关键需求，在查询效率、索引速度、内存占用和可扩展性方面都表现出色，为实际部署提供了实用解决方案。

Abstract: Approximate Nearest Neighbor Search (ANNS) is fundamental to modern AI applications. Most existing solutions optimize query efficiency but fail to align with the practical requirements of modern workloads. In this paper, we outline six critical demands of modern AI applications: high query efficiency, fast indexing, low memory footprint, scalability to high dimensionality, robustness across varying retrieval sizes, and support for online insertions. To satisfy all these demands, we introduce Projection-Augmented Graph (PAG), a new ANNS framework that integrates projection techniques into a graph index. PAG reduces unnecessary exact distance computations through asymmetric comparisons between exact and approximate distances as guided by projection-based statistical tests. Three key components are designed and unified to the graph index to optimize indexing and searching. Experiments on six modern datasets demonstrate that PAG consistently achieves superior query per second (QPS)-recall performance -- up to 5x faster than HNSW -- while offering fast indexing speed and moderate memory footprint. PAG remains robust as dimensionality and retrieval size increase and naturally supports online insertions.

</details>


### [379] [Leveraging Large Language Models for Automated Scalable Development of Open Scientific Databases](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07050)
*Nikita Gautam,Doina Caragea,Ignacio Ciampitti,Federico Gomez*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 提出基于大语言模型的自动化网络工具，用于构建领域特定科学数据库，通过关键词查询、API数据检索和LLM文本分类，显著减少人工工作量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在线科学文献呈指数增长，手动收集和筛选领域特定数据耗时耗力且容易出错，需要自动化解决方案来构建可靠的科学数据库。

Method: 开发基于LLM的自动化统一框架，结合关键词查询、API数据检索和LLM文本分类，采用并行查询技术从多个可靠数据源收集数据，然后使用针对每个查询定制的提示词通过LLM过滤相关数据。

Result: 在农业和作物产量等不同领域任务中测试，结果显示与小型专家策划数据库有90%的重叠度，证明该工具能显著减少人工工作量。

Conclusion: 该框架具有可扩展性和领域无关性，可应用于不同领域构建可扩展的开放科学数据库，为自动化数据收集提供有效解决方案。

Abstract: With the exponential increase in online scientific literature, identifying reliable domain-specific data has become increasingly important but also very challenging. Manual data collection and filtering for domain-specific scientific literature is not only time-consuming but also labor-intensive and prone to errors and inconsistencies. To facilitate automated data collection, the paper introduces a web-based tool that leverages Large Language Models (LLMs) for automated and scalable development of open scientific databases. More specifically, the tool is based on an automated and unified framework that combines keyword-based querying, API-enabled data retrieval, and LLM-powered text classification to construct domain-specific scientific databases. Data is collected from multiple reliable data sources and search engines using a parallel querying technique to construct a combined unified dataset. The dataset is subsequently filtered using LLMs queried with prompts tailored for each keyword-based query to extract the relevant data to a scientific query of interest. The approach was tested across a set of variable keyword-based searches for different domain-specific tasks related to agriculture and crop yield. The results and analysis show 90\% overlap with small domain expert-curated databases, suggesting that the proposed tool can be used to significantly reduce manual workload. Furthermore, the proposed framework is both scalable and domain-agnostic and can be applied across diverse fields for building scalable open scientific databases.

</details>


### [380] [Efficient Personalized Reranking with Semi-Autoregressive Generation and Online Knowledge Distillation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07107)
*Kai Cheng,Hao Wang,Wei Guo,Weiwen Liu,Yong Liu,Yawen Li,Enhong Chen*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: PSAD框架通过半自回归生成器和在线知识蒸馏解决推荐系统重排序中的质量-效率平衡问题，并引入用户画像网络增强用户-物品交互。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 生成模型在多阶段推荐系统的重排序中面临两个关键挑战：1）生成质量与低延迟推理之间的固有冲突；2）现有方法中用户和物品特征交互不足。

Method: 提出个性化半自回归在线知识蒸馏（PSAD）框架：教师模型采用半自回归生成器平衡质量与效率，通过在线知识蒸馏将排序知识转移到轻量级评分网络；引入用户画像网络（UPN）注入用户意图并建模兴趣动态。

Result: 在三个大规模公开数据集上的实验表明，PSAD在排序性能和推理效率方面均显著优于现有最先进基线方法。

Conclusion: PSAD框架有效解决了推荐系统重排序中的质量-效率平衡问题，通过半自回归生成器和在线知识蒸馏实现了高质量的实时推理，并通过用户画像网络增强了用户-物品交互。

Abstract: Generative models offer a promising paradigm for the final stage reranking in multi-stage recommender systems, with the ability to capture inter-item dependencies within reranked lists. However, their practical deployment still faces two key challenges: (1) an inherent conflict between achieving high generation quality and ensuring low-latency inference, making it difficult to balance the two, and (2) insufficient interaction between user and item features in existing methods. To address these challenges, we propose a novel Personalized Semi-Autoregressive with online knowledge Distillation (PSAD) framework for reranking. In this framework, the teacher model adopts a semi-autoregressive generator to balance generation quality and efficiency, while its ranking knowledge is distilled online into a lightweight scoring network during joint training, enabling real-time and efficient inference. Furthermore, we propose a User Profile Network (UPN) that injects user intent and models interest dynamics, enabling deeper interactions between users and items. Extensive experiments conducted on three large-scale public datasets demonstrate that PSAD significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines in both ranking performance and inference efficiency.

</details>


### [381] [Fine-Grained Table Retrieval Through the Lens of Complex Queries](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07146)
*Wojciech Kosiuk,Xingyu Ji,Yeounoh Chung,Fatma Özcan,Madelon Hulsebos*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: DCTR：一种用于关系数据库问答的表格检索机制，通过细粒度类型化查询分解和全局连接感知来处理复杂查询和密集连接数据库


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自然语言查询关系数据库需要有效的检索机制，现有方法在处理复杂使用场景中的开放域问答时面临挑战，特别是对于复合查询和密集连接数据库

Method: 提出DCTR机制，包含两个核心组件：细粒度类型化查询分解和全局连接感知，通过这两个机制处理查询复杂性和数据复杂性

Result: 在行业对齐基准测试中，DCTR对高度复合查询和密集连接数据库表现出鲁棒性，通过检索复杂性（查询复杂性和数据复杂性）的评估验证了其有效性

Conclusion: DCTR机制能够有效处理开放域关系数据库问答中的检索挑战，特别是在复杂查询和密集连接数据库场景下表现出色

Abstract: Enabling question answering over tables and databases in natural language has become a key capability in the democratization of insights from tabular data sources. These systems first require retrieval of data that is relevant to a given natural language query, for which several methods have been introduced. In this work we present and study a table retrieval mechanism devising fine-grained typed query decomposition and global connectivity-awareness (DCTR), to handle the challenges induced by open-domain question answering over relational databases in complex usage contexts. We evaluate the effectiveness of the two mechanisms through the lens of retrieval complexity which we measure along the axes of query- and data complexity. Our analyses over industry-aligned benchmarks illustrate the robustness of DCTR for highly composite queries and densely connected databases.

</details>


### [382] [Retrieving Minimal and Sufficient Reasoning Subgraphs with Graph Foundation Models for Path-aware GraphRAG](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07179)
*Haonan Yuan,Qingyun Sun,Junhua Shi,Mingjun Liu,Jiaqi Yuan,Ziwei Zhang,Xingcheng Fu,Jianxin Li*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: GFM-Retriever：利用预训练图基础模型作为跨领域检索器，通过信息瓶颈原则选择查询条件子图，实现多跳推理的图检索增强生成


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有图检索方法在冷启动场景下表现不佳，要么信息不完整，要么结构冗余。需要从结构角度重新审视检索，解决跨领域知识稀缺时的推理问题。

Method: 1) 将预训练图基础模型重新定位为跨领域检索器；2) 基于信息瓶颈原则设计无标签子图选择器，提取信息充分且结构最小的"核心集"；3) 显式提取并重组关系路径作为上下文提示，实现可解释推理。

Result: 在多跳问答基准测试中，GFM-Retriever在检索质量和答案生成方面均达到最先进性能，同时保持高效性。

Conclusion: 从结构角度重新思考检索，利用图基础模型作为跨领域检索器，结合信息瓶颈原则选择子图，能够有效解决冷启动场景下的知识密集型推理问题。

Abstract: Graph-based retrieval-augmented generation (GraphRAG) exploits structured knowledge to support knowledge-intensive reasoning. However, most existing methods treat graphs as intermediate artifacts, and the few subgraph-based retrieval methods depend on heuristic rules coupled with domain-specific distributions. They fail in typical cold-start scenarios where data in target domains is scarce, thus yielding reasoning contexts that are either informationally incomplete or structurally redundant. In this work, we revisit retrieval from a structural perspective, and propose GFM-Retriever that directly responds to user queries with a subgraph, where a pre-trained Graph Foundation Model acts as a cross-domain Retriever for multi-hop path-aware reasoning. Building on this perspective, we repurpose a pre-trained GFM from an entity ranking function into a generalized retriever to support cross-domain retrieval. On top of the retrieved graph, we further derive a label-free subgraph selector optimized by a principled Information Bottleneck objective to identify the query-conditioned subgraph, which contains informationally sufficient and structurally minimal golden evidence in a self-contained "core set". To connect structure with generation, we explicitly extract and reorganize relational paths as in-context prompts, enabling interpretable reasoning. Extensive experiments on multi-hop question answering benchmarks demonstrate that GFM-Retriever achieves state-of-the-art performance in both retrieval quality and answer generation, while maintaining efficiency.

</details>


### [383] [AutoDataset: A Lightweight System for Continuous Dataset Discovery and Search](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07271)
*Junzhe Yang,Xinghao Chen,Yunuo Liu,Zhijing Sun,Wenjin Guo,Xiaoyu Shen*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: AutoDataset是一个轻量级自动化系统，通过实时监控arXiv论文来自动发现和索引新发布的数据集，显著提高数据集发现效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有数据集平台依赖人工管理或社区提交，导致覆盖范围有限且更新延迟，研究人员难以及时发现新发布的数据集。

Method: 采用论文优先方法，通过多阶段流水线：1) 轻量级分类器筛选发布数据集的论文；2) 解析PDF提取数据集描述；3) 提取数据集URL；4) 使用密集语义检索器索引结构化记录。

Result: 分类器F1分数达0.94，推理延迟仅11毫秒；系统显著减少研究人员定位新数据集的时间，数据集发现效率提升高达80%。

Conclusion: AutoDataset实现了实时数据集发现，解决了现有平台依赖人工管理导致的覆盖不足和延迟问题，为机器学习社区提供了高效的数据集检索工具。

Abstract: The continuous expansion of task-specific datasets has become a major driver of progress in machine learning. However, discovering newly released datasets remains difficult, as existing platforms largely depend on manual curation or community submissions, leading to limited coverage and substantial delays. To address this challenge, we introduce AutoDataset, a lightweight, automated system for real-time dataset discovery and retrieval. AutoDataset adopts a paper-first approach by continuously monitoring arXiv to detect and index datasets directly from newly published research. The system operates through a low-overhead multi-stage pipeline. First, a lightweight classifier rapidly filters titles and abstracts to identify papers releasing datasets, achieving an F1 score of 0.94 with an inference latency of 11 ms. For identified papers, we parse PDFs with GROBID and apply a sentence-level extractor to extract dataset descriptions. Dataset URLs are extracted from the paper text with an automated fallback to LaTeX source analysis when needed. Finally, the structured records are indexed using a dense semantic retriever, enabling low-latency natural language search. We deploy AutoDataset as a live system that continuously ingests new papers and provides up-to-date dataset discovery. In practice, it has been shown to significantly reduce the time required for researchers to locate newly released datasets, improving dataset discovery efficiency by up to 80%.

</details>


### [384] [Do Deployment Constraints Make LLMs Hallucinate Citations? An Empirical Study across Four Models and Five Prompting Regimes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07287)
*Chen Zhao,Yuan Tang,Yitian Qian*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: LLMs生成学术引用时存在严重幻觉问题，即使在部署激励的提示约束下，引用可验证率仍低于47.5%，大量引用无法验证或为伪造


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLMs越来越多用于学术文本草拟和软件工程证据合成，但它们经常生成看似合法但实际不存在的参考文献（幻觉引用），需要研究部署激励的提示约束如何影响引用可验证性

Method: 使用144个主张（24个来自SE&CS领域），通过确定性验证流程（Crossref + Semantic Scholar），评估2个专有模型（Claude Sonnet, GPT-4o）和2个开源模型（LLaMA~3.1-8B, Qwen~2.5-14B）在五种提示约束下的表现：基线、时间约束（发表年份窗口）、综述式广度、非披露政策及其组合

Result: 在17,443个生成的引用中，所有模型的引用存在率均不超过0.475；时间约束和组合条件导致最大幅度的性能下降，而输出仍保持格式合规；未解决结果占主导（36-61%），100个引用的审计表明大量未解决案例是伪造的

Conclusion: LLM生成的引用存在严重可验证性问题，需要在LLM输出进入软件工程文献综述或工具流程之前进行事后引用验证

Abstract: LLMs are increasingly used to draft academic text and to support software engineering (SE) evidence synthesis, but they often hallucinate bibliographic references that look legitimate. We study how deployment-motivated prompting constraints affect citation verifiability in a closed-book setting. Using 144 claims (24 in SE&CS) and a deterministic verification pipeline (Crossref + Semantic Scholar), we evaluate two proprietary models (Claude Sonnet, GPT-4o) and two open-weight models (LLaMA~3.1-8B, Qwen~2.5-14B) across five regimes: Baseline, Temporal (publication-year window), Survey-style breadth, Non-Disclosure policy, and their combination. Across 17,443 generated citations, no model exceeds a citation-level existence rate of 0.475; Temporal and Combo conditions produce the steepest drops while outputs remain format-compliant (well-formed bibliographic fields). Unresolved outcomes dominate (36-61%); a 100-citation audit indicates that a substantial fraction of Unresolved cases are fabricated. Results motivate post-hoc citation verification before LLM outputs enter SE literature reviews or tooling pipelines.

</details>


### [385] [SeDa: A Unified System for Dataset Discovery and Multi-Entity Augmented Semantic Exploration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07502)
*Kan Ling,Zhen Qin,Yichi Zhu,Hengrun Zhang,Huiqun Yu,Guisheng Fan*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: SeDa是一个统一的数据集发现框架，整合了760多万个数据集，通过语义标注和多实体增强导航解决跨平台数据发现难题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 开放数据平台和研究库的持续扩展导致了碎片化的数据集生态系统，给跨源数据发现和解释带来了重大挑战。

Method: 1) 语义提取和标准化以统一异构元数据；2) 构建可扩展的标签图支持主题检索和跨域关联；3) 嵌入来源保证模块验证数据集来源和链接可用性；4) 采用多实体增强导航策略在知识空间中组织数据集。

Result: SeDa整合了来自200多个平台的760多万个数据集，涵盖政府、学术和工业领域。与ChatPD和Google Dataset Search等流行平台相比，SeDa在覆盖率、时效性和可追溯性方面表现更优。

Conclusion: SeDa为可信赖、语义丰富且全球可扩展的数据集探索奠定了基础。

Abstract: The continuous expansion of open data platforms and research repositories has led to a fragmented dataset ecosystem, posing significant challenges for cross-source data discovery and interpretation. To address these challenges, we introduce SeDa--a unified framework for dataset discovery, semantic annotation, and multi-entity augmented navigation. SeDa integrates more than 7.6 million datasets from over 200 platforms, spanning governmental, academic, and industrial domains. The framework first performs semantic extraction and standardization to harmonize heterogeneous metadata representations. On this basis, a topic-tagging mechanism constructs an extensible tag graph that supports thematic retrieval and cross-domain association, while a provenance assurance module embedded within the annotation process continuously validates dataset sources and monitors link availability to ensure reliability and traceability. Furthermore, SeDa employs a multi-entity augmented navigation strategy that organizes datasets within a knowledge space of sites, institutions, and enterprises, enabling contextual and provenance-aware exploration beyond traditional search paradigms. Comparative experiments with popular dataset search platforms, such as ChatPD and Google Dataset Search, demonstrate that SeDa achieves superior coverage, timeliness, and traceability. Taken together, SeDa establishes a foundation for trustworthy, semantically enriched, and globally scalable dataset exploration.

</details>


### [386] [Deep Research for Recommender Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07605)
*Kesha Ou,Chenghao Wu,Xiaolei Wang,Bowen Zheng,Wayne Xin Zhao,Weitao Li,Long Zhang,Sheng Chen,Ji-Rong Wen*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 提出RecPilot多智能体框架，将推荐系统从传统"工具式"列表范式转变为主动的"深度研究"范式，通过模拟用户轨迹和生成个性化报告来降低用户决策负担。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统推荐系统只是被动地提供物品列表，将探索、比较和综合的负担完全留给用户，这种"工具式"范式限制了用户体验。需要将推荐系统转变为主动的助手，提供更全面的决策支持。

Method: 提出RecPilot多智能体框架，包含两个核心组件：1) 用户轨迹模拟智能体，自主探索物品空间；2) 自演进报告生成智能体，将发现综合成连贯、可解释的个性化报告。将推荐重新定义为主动的、智能体驱动的服务。

Result: 在公共数据集上的广泛实验表明，RecPilot不仅在建模用户行为方面表现出色，还能生成高度有说服力的报告，显著减少用户在物品评估方面的努力。

Conclusion: RecPilot验证了从传统物品列表推荐向主动智能体驱动服务转变的新交互范式的潜力，为推荐系统提供了更全面、用户中心的决策支持。

Abstract: The technical foundations of recommender systems have progressed from collaborative filtering to complex neural models and, more recently, large language models. Despite these technological advances, deployed systems often underserve their users by simply presenting a list of items, leaving the burden of exploration, comparison, and synthesis entirely on the user. This paper argues that this traditional "tool-based" paradigm fundamentally limits user experience, as the system acts as a passive filter rather than an active assistant. To address this limitation, we propose a novel deep research paradigm for recommendation, which replaces conventional item lists with comprehensive, user-centric reports. We instantiate this paradigm through RecPilot, a multi-agent framework comprising two core components: a user trajectory simulation agent that autonomously explores the item space, and a self-evolving report generation agent that synthesizes the findings into a coherent, interpretable report tailored to support user decisions. This approach reframes recommendation as a proactive, agent-driven service. Extensive experiments on public datasets demonstrate that RecPilot not only achieves strong performance in modeling user behaviors but also generates highly persuasive reports that substantially reduce user effort in item evaluation, validating the potential of this new interaction paradigm.

</details>


### [387] [Verifiable Reasoning for LLM-based Generative Recommendation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07725)
*Xinyu Lin,Hanqing Zeng,Hanchao Yu,Yinglong Xia,Jiang Zhang,Aashu Singh,Fei Liu,Wenjie Wang,Fuli Feng,Tat-Seng Chua,Qifan Wang*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 提出了一种新的"推理-验证-推荐"范式来改进基于大语言模型的推荐系统，通过中间验证避免推理退化问题，提升推荐效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于LLM的推荐系统采用"先推理后推荐"范式，缺乏中间验证，容易导致推理退化（同质化或错误累积），从而影响推荐质量。

Method: 提出VRec系统，采用"推理-验证-推荐"范式，在推理过程中插入验证环节。设计了验证器的两个关键原则：可靠性和多维度性，使用混合验证器确保多维度验证，通过代理预测目标追求可靠性。

Result: 在四个真实世界数据集上的实验表明，VRec显著提升了推荐效果和可扩展性，同时不损害效率。

Conclusion: 提出的"推理-验证-推荐"范式通过中间验证解决了现有方法的推理退化问题，VRec系统实现了更可靠的用户偏好理解和更好的推荐性能。

Abstract: Reasoning in Large Language Models (LLMs) has recently shown strong potential in enhancing generative recommendation through deep understanding of complex user preference. Existing approaches follow a {reason-then-recommend} paradigm, where LLMs perform step-by-step reasoning before item generation. However, this paradigm inevitably suffers from reasoning degradation (i.e., homogeneous or error-accumulated reasoning) due to the lack of intermediate verification, thus undermining the recommendation. To bridge this gap, we propose a novel \textbf{\textit{reason-verify-recommend}} paradigm, which interleaves reasoning with verification to provide reliable feedback, guiding the reasoning process toward more faithful user preference understanding. To enable effective verification, we establish two key principles for verifier design: 1) reliability ensures accurate evaluation of reasoning correctness and informative guidance generation; and 2) multi-dimensionality emphasizes comprehensive verification across multi-dimensional user preferences. Accordingly, we propose an effective implementation called VRec. It employs a mixture of verifiers to ensure multi-dimensionality, while leveraging a proxy prediction objective to pursue reliability. Experiments on four real-world datasets demonstrate that VRec substantially enhances recommendation effectiveness and scalability without compromising efficiency. The codes can be found at https://github.com/Linxyhaha/Verifiable-Rec.

</details>


### [388] [Structure-Preserving Graph Contrastive Learning for Mathematical Information Retrieval](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08012)
*Chun-Hsi Ku,Hung-Hsuan Chen*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文提出变量替换作为数学公式检索中图对比学习的领域特定增强技术，相比通用方法能更好地保持公式的语义结构。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准图对比学习增强技术在处理数学公式这种小型高度结构化图时，往往会扭曲其语义含义，需要一种能保持代数关系和公式结构的领域特定增强方法。

Method: 提出变量替换作为领域特定的图增强技术，通过替换公式中的变量来生成增强样本，同时保持核心代数关系和公式结构不变。

Result: 实验表明，在经典GCL检索模型上应用变量替换技术，相比通用增强策略显著提升了检索性能。

Conclusion: 变量替换是一种简单有效的领域特定图增强技术，特别适用于数学公式检索任务，能更好地保持公式的语义结构并提升检索效果。

Abstract: This paper introduces Variable Substitution as a domain-specific graph augmentation technique for graph contrastive learning (GCL) in the context of searching for mathematical formulas. Standard GCL augmentation techniques often distort the semantic meaning of mathematical formulas, particularly for small and highly structured graphs. Variable Substitution, on the other hand, preserves the core algebraic relationships and formula structure. To demonstrate the effectiveness of our technique, we apply it to a classic GCL-based retrieval model. Experiments show that this straightforward approach significantly improves retrieval performance compared to generic augmentation strategies. We release the code on GitHub.\footnote{https://github.com/lazywulf/formula_ret_aug}.

</details>


### [389] [Why Large Language Models can Secretly Outperform Embedding Similarity in Information Retrieval](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08077)
*Matei Benescu,Ivo Pascal de Jong*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: LLM-Based Relevance Judgment Systems (LLM-RJS) 理论上能通过语言理解和推理超越基于嵌入相似性的神经检索系统，但在标准数据集上未观察到明显改进，原因是人工标注也存在短视性，限制了评估效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统神经嵌入检索系统(NERS)基于相似性计算相关性，但相似性是对相关性的短视理解。LLM通过语言理解和推理能更好地判断相关性，有望克服这一限制。

Method: 使用TREC-DL 2019段落检索数据集，比较多种LLM-RJS与NERS的性能，并分析推理的作用：对比有推理和无推理的LLM-RJS，同时分析人工标注的局限性。

Result: LLM-RJS在标准数据集上未表现出明显优于NERS的改进。研究发现推理型LLM-RJS的误判主要源于人工标注的短视性错误，而非系统本身缺陷。

Conclusion: LLM-RJS确实具备解决NERS短视性限制的能力，但这一优势无法通过标准标注的相关性数据集进行评估，因为人工标注本身也存在同样的短视性问题。

Abstract: With the emergence of Large Language Models (LLMs), new methods in Information Retrieval are available in which relevance is estimated directly through language understanding and reasoning, instead of embedding similarity. We argue that similarity is a short-sighted interpretation of relevance, and that LLM-Based Relevance Judgment Systems (LLM-RJS) (with reasoning) have potential to outperform Neural Embedding Retrieval Systems (NERS) by overcoming this limitation. Using the TREC-DL 2019 passage retrieval dataset, we compare various LLM-RJS with NERS, but observe no noticeable improvement. Subsequently, we analyze the impact of reasoning by comparing LLM-RJS with and without reasoning. We find that human annotations also suffer from short-sightedness, and that false-positives in the reasoning LLM-RJS are primarily mistakes in annotations due to short-sightedness. We conclude that LLM-RJS do have the ability to address the short-sightedness limitation in NERS, but that this cannot be evaluated with standard annotated relevance datasets.

</details>


### [390] [ERASE -- A Real-World Aligned Benchmark for Unlearning in Recommender Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08341)
*Pierre Lubitzsch,Maarten de Rijke,Sebastian Schelter*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: ERASE是一个用于推荐系统机器遗忘的大规模基准测试，涵盖三个核心任务、七个算法、九个数据集和九个模型，提供600GB可重用实验数据，系统评估现有遗忘方法的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有机器遗忘基准测试不能反映真实推荐系统场景：主要关注协同过滤、假设不现实的大规模删除请求、忽略顺序遗忘和效率等实际约束。

Method: 构建ERASE基准测试，涵盖协同过滤、会话推荐和下一篮推荐三个任务，包含真实应用场景的遗忘情景（如顺序删除敏感交互或垃圾信息），覆盖七个遗忘算法、九个公共数据集和九个最先进模型。

Result: 生成600GB可重用实验数据，包括大量实验日志和上千个模型检查点。近似遗忘在某些场景下能达到重新训练的效果，但鲁棒性随数据集和架构变化很大。重复遗忘暴露通用方法的弱点，而推荐专用方法表现更可靠。

Conclusion: ERASE为社区评估、推动和跟踪推荐系统实用机器遗忘进展提供了实证基础，揭示了当前方法在真实场景中的成功与不足。

Abstract: Machine unlearning (MU) enables the removal of selected training data from trained models, to address privacy compliance, security, and liability issues in recommender systems. Existing MU benchmarks poorly reflect real-world recommender settings: they focus primarily on collaborative filtering, assume unrealistically large deletion requests, and overlook practical constraints such as sequential unlearning and efficiency.
  We present ERASE, a large-scale benchmark for MU in recommender systems designed to align with real-world usage. ERASE spans three core tasks -- collaborative filtering, session-based recommendation, and next-basket recommendation -- and includes unlearning scenarios inspired by real-world applications, such as sequentially removing sensitive interactions or spam. The benchmark covers seven unlearning algorithms, including general-purpose and recommender-specific methods, across nine public datasets and nine state-of-the-art models. We execute ERASE to produce more than 600 GB of reusable artifacts, such as extensive experimental logs and more than a thousand model checkpoints.
  Crucially, the artifacts that we release enable systematic analysis of where current unlearning methods succeed and where they fall short. ERASE showcases that approximate unlearning can match retraining in some settings, but robustness varies widely across datasets and architectures. Repeated unlearning exposes weaknesses in general-purpose methods, especially for attention-based and recurrent models, while recommender-specific approaches behave more reliably. ERASE provides the empirical foundation to help the community assess, drive, and track progress toward practical MU in recommender systems.

</details>


<div id='cs.MM'></div>

# cs.MM [[Back]](#toc)

### [391] [Scalable On-the-fly Transcoding for Adaptive Streaming of Dynamic Point Clouds](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08417)
*Michael Rudolph,Matthias De Fré,Finn Schnier,Tim Wauters,Amr Rizk*

Main category: cs.MM

TL;DR: 提出并评估了利用实时转码的动态点云流媒体系统，通过缓存和推测转码显著降低转码负载，提高系统可扩展性


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 动态点云序列的实时转码可以减少存储需求并增加流媒体场景中的可用表示形式，但会给媒体提供商的基础设施带来额外工作负载。虽然V-PCC编码内容可以通过重新编码底层视频比特流来高效转码，但此类系统的可扩展性仍不明确

Method: 引入并评估了利用实时转码的动态点云流媒体系统，探索系统在请求完成时间方面的可扩展性限制，特别评估用户感知体验质量，并实证研究缓存和推测转码如何降低转码负载

Result: 缓存和推测转码能够显著降低转码负载，使系统能够扩展到更高数量的同时在线客户端

Conclusion: 通过缓存和推测转码技术，可以有效地提高动态点云流媒体系统的可扩展性，减少实时转码带来的工作负载，从而支持更多同时在线用户

Abstract: On-the-fly transcoding of dynamic point cloud sequences reduces storage requirements and virtually increases the number of available representations for on demand streaming scenarios. On-the-fly transcoding introduces, however, additional workload to media providers' infrastructure. While V-PCC encoded content can be efficiently transcoded by re-encoding the underlying video bitstreams, which greatly benefits from hardware-accelerated video codec implementations, the scalability of such a system remains unclear. In this work, we introduce and evaluate a dynamic point cloud streaming system that utilizes on-the-fly transcoding. We explore the limits of scalability of this system in terms of request fulfillment times, specifically evaluating the perceived user Quality of Experience. We empirically show how caching and speculative transcoding allow to significantly reduce transcoding loads, allowing to scale to a higher number of simultaneous clients.

</details>


<div id='cs.SE'></div>

# cs.SE [[Back]](#toc)

### [392] [GraphSkill: Documentation-Guided Hierarchical Retrieval-Augmented Coding for Complex Graph Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06620)
*Fali Wang,Chenglin Weng,Xianren Zhang,Siyuan Hong,Hui Liu,Suhang Wang*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 提出GraphSkill框架，通过层次化检索增强编码和自调试代理，提升LLM在图算法推理中的性能


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM图推理方法存在两个关键限制：1) 将技术文档视为扁平文本，忽略层次结构导致检索噪声；2) 调试机制主要关注运行时错误，忽略更关键的逻辑错误

Method: 提出GraphSkill框架，包含：1) 代理层次化检索增强编码，通过自上而下遍历和早期剪枝利用文档层次结构；2) 自调试编码代理，使用自动生成的小规模测试用例迭代优化代码

Result: 在提出的新数据集上进行广泛实验，该方法相比基线实现了更高的任务准确率和更低的推理成本

Conclusion: GraphSkill通过层次化检索和自调试机制有效解决了现有LLM图推理方法的局限性，提升了图算法推理的性能和效率

Abstract: The growing demand for automated graph algorithm reasoning has attracted increasing attention in the large language model (LLM) community. Recent LLM-based graph reasoning methods typically decouple task descriptions from graph data, generate executable code augmented by retrieval from technical documentation, and refine the code through debugging. However, we identify two key limitations in existing approaches: (i) they treat technical documentation as flat text collections and ignore its hierarchical structure, leading to noisy retrieval that degrades code generation quality; and (ii) their debugging mechanisms focus primarily on runtime errors, yet ignore more critical logical errors. To address them, we propose {\method}, an \textit{agentic hierarchical retrieval-augmented coding framework} that exploits the document hierarchy through top-down traversal and early pruning, together with a \textit{self-debugging coding agent} that iteratively refines code using automatically generated small-scale test cases. To enable comprehensive evaluation of complex graph reasoning, we introduce a new dataset, {\dataset}, covering small-scale, large-scale, and composite graph reasoning tasks. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method achieves higher task accuracy and lower inference cost compared to baselines\footnote{The code is available at \href{https://github.com/FairyFali/GraphSkill}{\textcolor{blue}{https://github.com/FairyFali/GraphSkill}}.}.

</details>


### [393] [ResearchEnvBench: Benchmarking Agents on Environment Synthesis for Research Code Execution](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06739)
*Yubang Wang,Chenxi Zhang,Bowen Chen,Zezheng Huai,Zihao Dai,Xinchi Chen,Yuxin Wang,Yining Zheng,Jingjing Gong,Xipeng Qiu*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 提出了ResearchEnvBench基准测试，用于评估AI代理在科学研究代码环境构建方面的能力，发现现有SOTA代理在依赖解析和版本兼容性方面存在显著不足


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前自主代理在科学研究中的评估通常假设预配置的执行环境，但实际研究中需要解决复杂的软件依赖、硬件框架版本对齐和分布式执行配置等问题，这些能力尚未得到充分评估

Method: 引入ResearchEnvBench基准测试，要求代理根据研究仓库、文档和目标执行设置，构建能够成功运行的环境，并在多样化的研究仓库上进行评估

Result: 评估显示当前最先进的代理存在显著差距，失败主要源于不完整的依赖解析和脆弱的版本耦合问题

Conclusion: ResearchEnvBench为推进自主代理实现可重复的科学研究提供了现实的测试平台

Abstract: Autonomous agents are increasingly expected to support scientific research, and recent benchmarks report progress in code repair and autonomous experimentation. However, these evaluations typically assume a pre-configured execution environment, which requires resolving complex software dependencies, aligning hardware and framework versions, and configuring distributed execution, yet this capability remains largely unbenchmarked. We introduce ResearchEnvBench, a benchmark for environment synthesis in research code execution. Given a research repository, documentation, and a target execution setting, agents must construct an environment that successfully executes at runtime. Evaluations on diverse research repositories reveal a substantial gap in current SOTA agents, with failures dominated by incomplete dependency resolution and brittle version coupling. ResearchEnvBench provides a realistic testbed for advancing autonomous agents toward reproducible scientific research.

</details>


### [394] [Characterizing Faults in Agentic AI: A Taxonomy of Types, Symptoms, and Root Causes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06847)
*Mehil B Shah,Mohammad Mehdi Morovati,Mohammad Masudur Rahman,Foutse Khomh*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 对40个开源智能体AI系统的13,602个问题进行分析，识别出37种故障类型、13类症状和12类根本原因，揭示了概率生成与确定性接口不匹配是主要故障来源。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 智能体AI系统结合了LLM推理与外部工具调用，其架构引入了传统软件和独立LLM应用不同的可靠性挑战，但目前缺乏对实际系统中故障起源、表现和传播的实证理解。

Method: 从40个开源智能体AI仓库收集13,602个问题和拉取请求，通过分层抽样选取385个故障进行定性分析，使用扎根理论推导故障分类，应用Apriori关联规则挖掘识别故障传播模式，并通过145名开发者的研究验证分类。

Result: 识别出13个高级故障类别下的37种具体故障类型、13类可观察症状和12类根本原因。发现许多故障源于概率生成产物与确定性接口约束的不匹配，涉及依赖集成、数据验证和运行时环境处理。关联规则挖掘揭示了跨组件的常见传播路径。

Conclusion: 智能体AI系统的故障模式与传统软件不同，主要源于概率性与确定性组件间的交互问题。提出的分类具有实际代表性（平均评分3.97/5），83.8%的开发者认为覆盖了他们遇到的故障，为系统设计和测试提供了重要指导。

Abstract: Agentic AI systems combine large language model (LLM) reasoning with external tool invocation and long-horizon task execution. Although these systems are increasingly deployed in practice, their architectural composition introduces reliability challenges that differ from those in traditional software systems and standalone LLM applications. However, there is limited empirical understanding of how faults originate, manifest, and propagate in real-world agentic AI systems. To address this gap, we conduct a large-scale empirical study of faults in agentic AI systems. We collect 13,602 issues and pull requests from 40 open-source agentic AI repositories and apply stratified sampling to select 385 faults for in-depth qualitative analysis. Using grounded theory, we derive taxonomies of fault types, observable symptoms, and root causes. We further apply Apriori-based association rule mining to identify statistically significant relationships among faults, symptoms, and root causes, revealing common fault propagation patterns. Finally, we validate the taxonomy through a developer study with 145 practitioners. Our analysis identifies 37 distinct fault types grouped into 13 higher-level fault categories, along with 13 classes of observable symptoms and 12 categories of root causes. The results show that many failures originate from mismatches between probabilistically generated artifacts and deterministic interface constraints, frequently involving dependency integration, data validation, and runtime environment handling. Association rule mining further reveals recurring propagation pathways across system components, such as token management faults leading to authentication failures and datetime handling defects causing scheduling anomalies. Practitioners rated the taxonomy as representative of real-world failures (mean = 3.97/5), and 83.8% reported that it covered faults they had encountered.

</details>


### [395] [Patch Validation in Automated Vulnerability Repair](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06858)
*Zheng Yu,Wenxuan Shi,Xinqian Sun,Zheyun Feng,Meng Xu,Xinyu Xing*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 论文指出当前自动漏洞修复系统仅使用基本测试验证补丁，忽略了开发者提供的PoC+测试，导致补丁成功率被高估40%以上，需要改进根因分析、规范遵循和意图理解能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前基于大语言模型的自动漏洞修复系统在验证补丁时存在严重缺陷：它们只使用基本测试（功能测试和PoC漏洞利用测试），却忽略了开发者提供的PoC+测试，这些测试包含了根因定位、最佳修复策略、编码风格等额外语义信息。

Method: 构建了包含209个案例、覆盖20个项目的PVBench基准测试集，每个案例包含基本测试（补丁前的功能测试和PoC漏洞利用测试）以及相关的PoC+测试。使用该基准测试三个最先进的AVR系统。

Result: 超过40%被基本测试验证为正确的补丁在PoC+测试下失败，表明当前AVR系统的补丁成功率被严重高估。错误标记为正确的补丁主要存在三个问题：根因分析不足、程序规范遵循不够、开发者意图理解不准确。

Conclusion: AVR系统需要改进三个关键方面：根因分析能力、程序规范遵循能力、开发者意图理解能力。PoC+测试应该成为AVR系统评估的重要标准，以更准确地衡量修复质量。

Abstract: Automated Vulnerability Repair (AVR) systems, especially those leveraging large language models (LLMs), have demonstrated promising results in patching vulnerabilities -- that is, if we trust their patch validation methodology. Ground-truth patches from human developers often come with new tests that not only ensure mitigation of the vulnerability but also encode extra semantics such as root cause location, optimal fix strategy, or subtle coding styles or conventions. And yet, none of the recent AVR systems verify that the auto-generated patches additionally pass these new tests (termed as $\text{PoC}^+$ tests). This is a subtle yet critical omission.
  To fill this gap, we constructed a benchmark, $\textrm{PVBench}$, with 209 cases spanning 20 projects. Each case includes basic tests (functional tests before the patch and the PoC exploit) as well as the associated $\text{PoC}^+$ tests. Evaluated on three state-of-the-art AVR systems, we find that over 40\% of patches validated as correct by basic tests fail under $\text{PoC}^+$ testing, revealing substantial overestimation on patch success rates. Analyzing these patches that are falsely labeled as correct, we suggest that AVR tools should improve in three critical areas: root cause analysis, adherence to program specifications, and capturing developer intention.

</details>


### [396] [A Declarative Framework for Hand-Crafted Mutation Analysis and Management](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07065)
*Alperen Keles*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 提出一个声明式框架用于手工变异分析和管理，支持多种变异表示形式，定义变异代数，实现无损转换管道，并在Marauder原型系统中实现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前手工变异分析工具碎片化，需要在可读性、变异保持性和执行成本之间权衡，需要统一的框架来支持更高效和表达性更强的变异实验。

Method: 1) 特征化五种变异表示形式；2) 定义支持选择性执行、标签扩展和高阶组合的变异代数；3) 设计通过公共中间形式映射变异表示的无损转换管道；4) 在Marauder原型系统中实现注入、激活、重置和组合功能。

Result: 开发了Marauder原型系统，能够跨表示形式注入、激活、重置和组合手工变异，为更高效和表达性更强的变异实验提供了实用基础。

Conclusion: 该框架澄清了手工变异系统的设计空间，为更高效和表达性更强的变异实验提供了实用基础，解决了当前工具碎片化和权衡问题。

Abstract: Hand-crafted mutants are increasingly used to evaluate fuzzing and property-based testing tools, but current tooling is fragmented and often forces trade-offs between readability, mutation preservation, and execution cost. We present a declarative framework for hand-crafted mutation analysis and management. First, we characterize five mutation representations: comment-based, preprocessor-based, patch-based, match-and-replace, and in-AST mutations. Second, we define a mutation algebra that supports selective execution, tag-based expansion, and higher-order combinations of mutants. Third, we describe a lossless conversion pipeline that maps mutation representations through a common intermediate form, including a strategy for extracting and normalizing in-AST mutations. We implement these ideas in Marauder, a prototype system for injecting, activating, resetting, and composing hand-crafted mutants across representations. This framework clarifies the design space of hand-crafted mutation systems and provides a practical foundation for more efficient and expressive mutation experiments.

</details>


### [397] [Exploring the Reasoning Depth of Small Language Models in Software Architecture: A Multidimensional Evaluation Framework Towards Software Engineering 2.0](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07091)
*Ha Vo,Nhut Tran,Khang Vo,Phat T. Tran-Truong,Son Ha*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 研究评估了10个小型语言模型在软件架构决策记录生成任务上的表现，发现参数规模超过30亿的模型具有更强的零样本能力，而20亿以下模型通过微调能获得最大BERTScore提升，但合规性改进不保证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在"软件工程2.0"时代，生成式AI正从代码生成扩展到软件架构领域。虽然大语言模型表现出色，但计算成本和数据隐私问题促使人们关注参数少于70亿的小型语言模型。然而，这些资源受限模型的推理能力限制尚未被充分探索。

Method: 本研究对10个最先进的小型语言模型进行基准测试，专注于架构决策记录生成任务。引入了一个多维评估框架，评估技术合规性和语义多样性。采用零样本、微调和少样本提示等多种方法进行实验。

Result: 研究发现显著的推理差距：参数超过30亿的模型展现出强大的零样本能力；而20亿以下模型通过微调获得最大的BERTScore提升，但合规性改进不一定保证。少样本提示对某些中等规模模型是有效的校准机制。现成小型模型的高语义多样性往往与幻觉相关而非有效探索。

Conclusion: 这些发现为部署可持续、本地托管的架构助手建立了严谨的基准。研究揭示了小型语言模型在软件架构任务中的实际能力限制和优化策略，为资源受限环境下的AI辅助软件工程提供了指导。

Abstract: In the era of "Software Engineering 2.0" (SE 2.0), where intelligent agents collaborate with human engineers, Generative AI is advancing beyond code generation into Software Architecture (SA). While Large Language Models (LLMs) demonstrate superior capabilities, computational costs and data privacy concerns drive interest in Small Language Models (SLMs) with fewer than 7 billion parameters. However, the reasoning limits of these resource-constrained models remain unexplored. This study benchmarks 10 state-of-the-art SLMs on Architectural Decision Records generation, introducing a multi-dimensional framework evaluating Technical Compliance and Semantic Diversity. Our empirical results reveal a significant reasoning gap: models above the 3B-parameter threshold demonstrate robust zero-shot capabilities, while sub-2B models show the strongest BERTScore gains from Fine-Tuning, though compliance improvements are not guaranteed. Contrary to assumptions regarding context saturation, Few-Shot prompting serves as a highly effective calibration mechanism for select mid-sized models with short context windows. Furthermore, high semantic diversity in off-the-shelf small models often correlates with hallucination rather than productive exploration. These findings establish a rigorous baseline for deploying sustainable, locally hosted architectural assistants.

</details>


### [398] [A Hybrid LTR-based System via Social Context Embedding for Recommending Solutions of Software Bugs in Developer Communities](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07229)
*Fouzi Harrag,Mokdad Khemliche*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 该研究提出一个基于深度学习的学习排序推荐系统，通过挖掘Stack Overflow的问答数据，为软件开发者推荐最佳的错误解决方案，在推荐前10个答案时达到约78%的正确率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Stack Overflow等问答论坛对开发者解决软件错误很重要，但手动搜索大量候选答案耗时且不一定能找到最佳方案，需要更有效的解决方案推荐方法。

Method: 使用深度学习构建基于学习排序的推荐模型，结合文本挖掘、自然语言处理和推荐算法，利用Stack Overflow的社交上下文特征嵌入，从问答数据中提取、评估和推荐最佳错误解决方案。

Result: 模型在推荐每个问题前10个最佳答案时，能达到接近78%的正确解决方案识别率。

Conclusion: 数据挖掘和机器学习技术能有效解决软件错误解决方案推荐问题，提出的深度学习推荐系统能显著提高开发者寻找解决方案的效率。

Abstract: Questions and Answering forums such as Stack Overflow play an important role in supporting software developers in finding answers to queries related to issues such as software errors and bugs. However, searching through a large set of candidate answers could be time consuming and may not lead to the best solution. In this research, the effectiveness of data mining models and machine learning techniques to solve this kind of problems is evaluated. We propose a recommender system to aid developers in finding solutions to their software bugs by carefully mining Stack Overflow. The proposed model leverages the knowledge available through crowdsourcing the Q&A available in Stack Overflow to recommend a solution to software bugs. We use deep learning techniques to construct the required Learning-to-Rank (LTR)-based model using the social context embedding the Stack Overflow features. Text mining, natural language processing and recommendation algorithms are used to extract, evaluate and recommend the best relevant bug solutions. Additionally, our model achieves nearly 78% correct solutions when recommending the 10 best answers for each question.

</details>


### [399] [Echo: Graph-Enhanced Retrieval and Execution Feedback for Issue Reproduction Test Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07326)
*Zhiwei Fei,Yue Pan,Federica Sarro,Jidong Ge,Marc Liu,Vincent Ng,He Ye*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: Echo是一个用于生成问题复现测试用例的智能代理，通过代码图检索、自动查询优化、测试执行和补丁验证，在SWT-Bench上达到66.28%的成功率


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的bug报告通常缺乏可靠的复现测试用例，手动编写这些测试用例耗时且需要深入理解代码库，因此需要自动化工具来生成可靠的bug复现测试

Method: 1. 使用代码图和自动查询优化策略增强上下文检索；2. 自动执行生成的测试用例；3. 生成潜在补丁并用补丁版本验证测试是否满足"失败到通过"标准；4. 为每个问题只生成一个测试用例，提供更好的成本性能平衡

Result: 在SWT-Bench Verified基准测试中，Echo达到了66.28%的成功率，在开源方法中建立了新的最先进水平

Conclusion: Echo通过集成代码图检索、自动测试执行和补丁验证等创新特性，显著提高了bug复现测试生成的效率和准确性，为实际开发工作流程提供了实用的自动化解决方案

Abstract: Identifying the root cause of a bug remains difficult for many developers because bug reports often lack a bug reproducing test case that reliably triggers the failure. Manually writing such test cases is time-consuming and requires substantial effort to understand the codebase and isolate the failing behavior. To address this challenge, we propose Echo, an agent for generating issue reproducing test cases, which advances previous work in several ways. During generation, Echo strengthens context retrieval by leveraging a code graph and a novel automatic query-refinement strategy. Echo also improves upon previous tools by automatically executing generated test cases, a first-of-its-kind feature that seamlessly integrates into practical development workflows. In addition, Echo generates potential patches and uses the patched version to validate whether a candidate test meets the fail-to-pass criterion and to provide actionable feedback for refinement. Unlike prior bug-reproduction agents that sample and rank multiple candidate tests, Echo generates a single test per issue, offering a better cost-performance trade-off. Experiments on SWT-Bench Verified show that Echo establishes a new state of the art among open-source approaches, achieving a 66.28% success rate.

</details>


### [400] [Regression Testing in Remote and Hybrid Software Teams: An Exploratory Study of Processes, Tools, and Practices](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07419)
*Juliane Pascoal,Cleytton Magalhaes,Ronnie de Souza Santos*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 该研究通过访谈20名软件专业人员，分析了远程/混合工作模式下回归测试的实践变化，发现核心流程稳定但执行更依赖文档、自动化和工具集成，沟通挑战通过标准化报告和共享仓库缓解。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着远程和混合工作模式成为软件开发团队的新常态，需要了解在这种分布式条件下回归测试如何执行和体验，以及软件质量保证实践如何演变。

Method: 采用定性访谈方法，对来自不同组织的20名软件专业人员进行访谈，分析回归测试流程、工具和协调实践在远程/混合环境中的适应情况。

Result: 回归测试的核心阶段保持稳定，但执行更加依赖文档、自动化和工具集成来支持异步协作；沟通协调挑战通过标准化报告、共享仓库和可追溯性机制缓解，替代了非正式的面对面互动。

Conclusion: 回归测试是一种社会技术实践，由人类协作和数字基础设施的交互塑造；研究有助于理解远程条件下软件质量保证的演变，并为采用混合工作模式的团队和组织提供实践启示。

Abstract: Remote and hybrid work have transformed how software development teams organize, communicate, and assure quality. This study investigates how regression testing is performed and experienced under these distributed conditions. Using qualitative interviews with twenty software professionals from diverse organizations, we analyzed how regression testing processes, tools, and coordination practices adapt to remote and hybrid environments. The results show that while the core phases of regression testing remain stable, their execution increasingly depends on documentation, automation, and tool integration to support asynchronous collaboration. Communication and coordination challenges were mitigated through standardized reporting, shared repositories, and traceability mechanisms that replaced informal co-located interactions. These findings reveal regression testing as a socio-technical practice shaped by the interaction between human collaboration and digital infrastructure. Our study contributes to understanding how software quality assurance evolves under remote conditions and offers practical implications for teams and organizations adopting hybrid work models.

</details>


### [401] [Empathy in Software Engineering Education: Evidence, Practices, and Opportunities](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07421)
*Matheus de Morais Leca,Kim Johnston,Ronnie de Souza Santos*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 该研究通过系统文献综述分析了工程与软件工程教育中的共情培养，发现软件工程将共情转化为结构化、可测量的设计实践，建议将其作为持续可评估的课程组件。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 共情作为软件工程师的关键能力，对协作、伦理意识和以用户为中心的设计至关重要，但在软件工程教育中的整合仍不系统。本研究旨在探索工程和软件工程教育中如何教授共情，以指导其系统性地融入软件课程。

Method: 遵循软件工程系统综述指南，在六个数据库中搜索2001-2025年的文献，最终分析43项主要研究，采用描述性和主题分析对数据进行编码和综合。

Result: 研究发现：工程专业将共情视为与社会责任相关的伦理反思能力，而软件工程将其转化为结构化、设计导向、可测量的实践。共情教学能增强协作、伦理推理、偏见意识和学习动机，但面临课程优先级低、测量困难和资源限制等挑战。

Conclusion: 共情正从边缘软技能演变为软件工程教育中可测量的教学建构。将其作为设计和开发课程的持续可评估组件，可以加强未来软件专业人员的包容性、伦理反思和负责任创新。

Abstract: \textbf{Context:} Empathy is increasingly recognized as a critical human capability for software engineers, supporting collaboration, ethical awareness, and user-centered design. While many disciplines have long explored empathy as part of professional formation, its incorporation into software engineering education remains fragmented. \textbf{Aim:} This study investigates how empathy has been used, taught, and discussed in general engineering and software engineering education, with the goal of identifying pedagogical practices, outcomes, and disciplinary differences that inform the structured integration of empathy into software curricula. \textbf{Method:} Following established guidelines for systematic reviews in software engineering, we conducted a comprehensive search across six databases and analyzed 43 primary studies published between 2001 and 2025. Data were coded and synthesized using descriptive and thematic analysis to capture how empathy is conceptualized, fostered, and assessed across educational contexts. \textbf{Findings:} Our findings show that engineering programs frame empathy as an ethical and reflective capacity linked to social responsibility, whereas software engineering translates empathy into structured, design-oriented, and measurable practices. Across both domains, empathy teaching enhances collaboration, ethical reasoning, bias awareness, and motivation, but remains limited by low curricular prioritization, measurement challenges, and resource constraints. \textbf{Conclusion:} Empathy is evolving from a peripheral soft skill into a measurable pedagogical construct in software engineering education. Embedding empathy as a continuous, assessable component of design and development courses can strengthen inclusivity, ethical reflection, and responsible innovation in future software professionals.

</details>


### [402] [On the Effectiveness of Code Representation in Deep Learning-Based Automated Patch Correctness Assessment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07520)
*Quanjun Zhang,Chunrong Fang,Haichuan Hu,Yuan Zhao,Weisong Sun,Yun Yang,Tao Zheng,Zhenyu Chen*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文首次系统研究不同代码表示在预测补丁正确性上的性能，发现图基表示（如CPG）优于其他表示，平均准确率达82.6%，并能提升现有APCA方法性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自动化程序修复（APR）面临补丁过拟合问题，现有预测补丁正确性方法（APCA）中代码表示缺乏系统研究，需要评估不同表示对预测性能的影响。

Method: 通过500多个训练的APCA模型，在15个基准测试上评估四类代码表示（包括图基、序列基等）和11个分类器的性能，重点关注图基表示（如CPG）与其他表示的比较。

Result: 图基代码表示（如CPG）在三个GNN模型上平均准确率达82.6%，优于其他表示；能提升现有APCA方法性能（如TREETRAIN+AST过滤87.09%过拟合补丁）；序列基与启发式表示结合可提升13.5%。

Conclusion: 图基代码表示在预测补丁正确性方面具有显著优势，能提高APR工具实用性并减少人工调试工作量，但实际应用仍面临挑战。

Abstract: Automated program repair (APR) attempts to generate correct patches and has drawn wide attention from both academia and industry in the past decades. However, APR is continuously struggling with the patch overfitting issue due to the weak test suites. Thus, to address the overfitting problem, the community has proposed an increasing number of approaches to predict patch correctness (APCA approaches). Among them, locally deep learning approaches aimed at automatically match designs has been emerging strongly. Such approaches typically encode input code snippets into well-designed representations and build a binary model for correctness prediction. Despite being fundamental in reason about patch correctness, code representation has not been systematically investigated. To bridge this gap, we perform the first extensive study to evaluate the performance of different code representations on predicting patch correctness from more than 500 trained APCA models. The experimental results on 15 benchmarks with four categories and 11 classifiers show that the graph-based code representation which is ill-explored in the literature, consistently outperforms other representations, e.g., an average accuracy of 82.6% for CPG across three GNN models. Moreover, we demonstrate that such representations can achieve comparable or better performance for three different previous APCA approaches, e.g., filtering out 87.09% overfitting patches by TREETRAIN with AST. We further find that integrating sequence-based representation into heuristic-based representation is able to yield an average improvement of 13.5% on five metrics. Overall, our study highlights the potential and challenges of utilizing code representation to reason about patch correctness, thus increasing the usability of off-the-shelf APR tools and reducing the manual debugging effort of developers in practice.

</details>


### [403] [AgentRaft: Automated Detection of Data Over-Exposure in LLM Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07557)
*Yixi Lin,Jiangrong Wu,Yuhong Nan,Xueqiang Wang,Xinyuan Zhang,Zibin Zheng*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: AgentRaft是一个自动检测LLM代理中数据过度暴露风险的框架，通过程序分析和语义推理识别隐私违规，在真实工具测试中达到高准确率和覆盖率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM代理在自主任务执行中引发隐私担忧，存在数据过度暴露风险，即代理无意中传输超出用户意图和功能必要性的敏感数据，需要系统化检测方法。

Method: AgentRaft框架包含三个协同模块：1)构建跨工具函数调用图建模工具交互；2)遍历调用图合成高质量测试提示触发深层工具执行；3)运行时污点跟踪和多LLM投票委员会基于全球隐私法规识别隐私违规。

Result: 在6,675个真实代理工具测试中，发现57.07%的工具交互路径存在数据过度暴露风险。AgentRaft检测准确率比基线高87.24%，仅用150个提示达到99%覆盖率，每条链验证成本降低88.6%。

Conclusion: 数据过度暴露是LLM代理中的系统性风险，AgentRaft为构建可审计和隐私合规的LLM代理系统提供了实用基础。

Abstract: The rapid integration of Large Language Model (LLM) agents into autonomous task execution has introduced significant privacy concerns within cross-tool data flows. In this paper, we systematically investigate and define a novel risk termed Data Over-Exposure (DOE) in LLM Agent, where an Agent inadvertently transmits sensitive data beyond the scope of user intent and functional necessity. We identify that DOE is primarily driven by the broad data paradigms in tool design and the coarse-grained data processing inherent in LLMs. In this paper, we present AgentRaft, the first automated framework for detecting DOE risks in LLM agents. AgentRaft combines program analysis with semantic reasoning through three synergistic modules: (1) it constructs a Cross-Tool Function Call Graph (FCG) to model the interaction landscape of heterogeneous tools; (2) it traverses the FCG to synthesize high-quality testing user prompts that act as deterministic triggers for deep-layer tool execution; and (3) it performs runtime taint tracking and employs a multi-LLM voting committee grounded in global privacy regulations (e.g., GDPR, CCPA, PIPL) to accurately identify privacy violations. We evaluate AgentRaft on a testing environment of 6,675 real-world agent tools. Our findings reveal that DOE is indeed a systemic risk, prevalent in 57.07% of potential tool interaction paths. AgentRaft achieves a high detection accuracy and effectiveness, outperforming baselines by 87.24%. Furthermore, AgentRaft reaches near-total DOE coverage (99%) within only 150 prompts while reducing per-chain verification costs by 88.6%. Our work provides a practical foundation for building auditable and privacy-compliant LLM agent systems.

</details>


### [404] [KCoEvo: A Knowledge Graph Augmented Framework for Evolutionary Code Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07581)
*Jiazhen Kang,Yuchen Lu,Chen Jiang,Jinrui Liu,Tianhao Zhang,Bo Jiang,Ningyuan Sun,Tongtong Wu,Guilin Qi*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 提出基于知识图谱增强的框架，将API迁移任务分解为演化路径检索和路径指导的代码生成两阶段，显著提升迁移准确性和可控性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 第三方API的频繁变更导致现有代码被破坏，维护变得复杂。虽然大语言模型在代码生成方面有潜力，但缺乏对API演化关系的结构化表示，导致生成过时API或无效输出。

Method: 构建静态和动态API图谱来建模版本内结构和跨版本转换，将迁移任务分解为演化路径检索和路径指导的代码生成两个协同阶段。使用真实API差异自动生成合成监督数据进行训练。

Result: 在单包和多包基准测试中，该框架显著提高了迁移准确性、可控性和执行成功率，优于标准LLM基线。

Conclusion: 知识图谱增强框架通过结构化表示API演化关系，有效解决了LLM在API迁移任务中的局限性，为代码维护提供了可扩展且高效的解决方案。

Abstract: Code evolution is inevitable in modern software development. Changes to third-party APIs frequently break existing code and complicate maintenance, posing practical challenges for developers. While large language models (LLMs) have shown promise in code generation, they struggle to reason without a structured representation of these evolving relationships, often leading them to produce outdated APIs or invalid outputs. In this work, we propose a knowledge graph-augmented framework that decomposes the migration task into two synergistic stages: evolution path retrieval and path-informed code generation. Our approach constructs static and dynamic API graphs to model intra-version structures and cross-version transitions, enabling structured reasoning over API evolution. Both modules are trained with synthetic supervision automatically derived from real-world API diffs, ensuring scalability and minimal human effort. Extensive experiments across single-package and multi-package benchmarks demonstrate that our framework significantly improves migration accuracy, controllability, and execution success over standard LLM baselines. The source code and datasets are available at: https://github.com/kangjz1203/KCoEvo.

</details>


### [405] [The Effect of Code Obfuscation on Human Program Comprehension](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07668)
*Anh H. N. Nguyen,Jack Le,Ilse Lahnstein Coronado,Tien N. Nguyen*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 研究代码混淆如何影响人类对程序的理解，通过输出预测任务发现混淆会增加推理时间、降低准确性，但效果在Python和JavaScript中不同，且混淆促使人们从启发式推理转向更审慎的思考。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究代码混淆技术如何影响程序员理解和推理代码的能力，这对于软件安全、代码审查和维护具有重要意义。

Method: 构建多层次混淆（从无混淆到标识符重命名、误导性标识符、控制流修改及其组合），应用于Python和JavaScript函数级程序，通过输出预测任务测量正确率、响应时间和编程经验。

Result: 混淆通常增加推理时间并降低准确性，但混淆强度与性能关系非单调且语言间差异显著：JavaScript符合预期模式，Python中某些重命名变换表现与无混淆基线相当甚至更好；混淆促使从快速启发式推理转向审慎推理；编程经验主要在语言内预测性能，跨语言迁移有限。

Conclusion: 代码混淆通过干扰语言特定熟悉度而非一般编程能力来影响理解，促使更审慎的推理过程，但效果因语言和混淆类型而异，对软件安全和代码审查有实际意义。

Abstract: We investigate how code obfuscation influences human understanding of programs through an output-prediction task. To study this effect, we construct multiple levels of obfuscation, ranging from unobfuscated code to transformations involving identifier renaming, adversarially misleading identifiers, control-flow modifications, and combinations of these techniques. These transformations are applied to function-level programs written in Python and JavaScript. Participants were asked to predict program outputs while we recorded correctness, response time, and self-reported programming experience.
  Our results show that obfuscation generally increases the time required to reason about code and tends to reduce prediction accuracy. However, the relationship between obfuscation strength and performance is not strictly monotonic and varies across programming languages. JavaScript exhibits the expected pattern of increasing difficulty with stronger obfuscation, whereas Python displays a more complex trend in which certain renaming transformations can perform comparably to, or occasionally better than, the unobfuscated baseline. Response-time analyses further suggest that obfuscation shifts participants away from rapid, heuristic reasoning toward slower and more deliberate reasoning processes. Performance appears highest within a moderate range of response times, indicating that careful deliberation can improve accuracy, while extremely long response times often correspond to confusion. Finally, programming experience predicts performance primarily within a given language, with limited transfer across languages, suggesting that obfuscation challenges language-specific familiarity more than general programming ability.

</details>


### [406] [The role of team diversity in AI systems development](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07749)
*Ronnie de Souza Santos,Maria Teresa Baldassarre,Cleyton Magalhaes*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 研究探讨团队多样性在AI系统开发中的作用，发现多样性有助于识别偏见、引入同理心、解决系统性歧视、支持包容性决策、作为偏见防护机制，并促进问题解决的广泛思考。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: AI技术的广泛应用加剧了对公平性和偏见的担忧，这些系统常通过有缺陷的数据和设计选择延续社会不平等。虽然软件工程研究主要关注技术解决方案（如改进数据集和模型），但塑造AI结果的社会动态仍未得到充分探索。

Method: 采用扎根理论方法，对一家在巴西和葡萄牙运营并与全球客户合作的大型软件公司中的四个AI团队进行25次访谈。研究涵盖教育、能源、可访问性和面部识别等多个领域的项目，确保接触全球开发实践和多样化的团队动态。

Result: 分析揭示了团队多样性在AI开发中扮演的六个关键角色：1) 多样化视角以识别偏见；2) 为AI开发带来同理心；3) 解决系统性歧视；4) 支持包容性和参与性决策；5) 将多样性作为对抗偏见的防护机制；6) 促进问题解决的广泛思考。

Conclusion: 研究强调了在AI项目中纳入多样化视角的重要性，并为将公平性考虑整合到软件开发实践中提供了实用建议。团队多样性不仅是道德要求，也是开发更公平、更包容AI系统的关键实践策略。

Abstract: The widespread integration of AI technologies has intensified concerns about fairness and bias, as these systems often perpetuate societal inequalities through flawed data and design choices. While software engineering research has largely concentrated on technical solutions, such as improving datasets and models, the social dynamics that shape AI outcomes remain underexplored. This study investigates the role of team diversity in the development of AI systems. Drawing from the experience of four AI focused teams working in a large software company operating in Brazil and Portugal, and collaborating with global clients, the study explores how diverse teams influence the development of AI systems. Using Grounded Theory, we conducted 25 interviews with software professionals involved in projects spanning domains such as education, energy, accessibility, and facial recognition. Although our study is conducted in an organizational setting, the variety of projects, from regional to multinational, ensures exposure to global development practices and diverse team dynamics, bringing a variety of perspectives into our findings. Our analysis revealed six key roles that team diversity played in AI development: diversifying perspectives for bias identification, bringing empathy to AI development, addressing systemic discrimination, supporting inclusive and participatory decision making, using diversity as a safeguard against bias, and fostering broadened thinking in problem solving. These findings highlight the importance of incorporating diverse perspectives in AI projects and offer practical recommendations for integrating fairness considerations into software development practices.

</details>


### [407] [IOTEL: A Tool for Generating IoT-enriched Object-Centric Event Logs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07906)
*Jia Wei,Xin Su,Chun Ouyang*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: IOTEL工具通过OCEL模式系统生成物联网增强的对象中心事件日志，解决物联网数据与业务流程日志集成难题


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 物联网数据与业务流程事件日志集成对分析物联网增强流程至关重要，但由于抽象层次差异和数据源分离，现有工具要么依赖专用模式，要么仅从传感器数据提取事件日志，对将流程相关物联网数据集成到现有事件日志的支持有限

Method: 提出IOTEL工具，基于OCEL（对象中心事件日志）模式，系统生成物联网增强的对象中心事件日志，实现结构化物联网数据集成，兼容现有流程挖掘工具

Result: IOTEL工具支持从业者和研究人员分析物联网增强的业务流程，已在真实场景中演示验证，提供在线演示视频

Conclusion: IOTEL填补了物联网数据与业务流程日志集成的空白，通过OCEL模式实现结构化集成，为物联网增强流程分析提供系统化解决方案

Abstract: Integrating Internet of Things (IoT) data with business process event logs is crucial for analysing IoT-enhanced processes, yet remains challenging due to differences in abstraction levels and the separation of data sources. Simply incorporating raw IoT data increases the size and complexity of the resulting log, often requiring additional processing before process analysis can be performed. While tools for generating IoT-enriched event logs exist, they either rely on specialised schemas or focus on extracting event logs from sensor data, offering limited support for integrating process-relevant IoT data into existing event logs. To address this gap, we present IOTEL, a tool for systematically generating IoT-enriched object-centric event logs (OCEL). By building on the OCEL schema, IOTEL enables structured IoT data integration compatible with existing process mining tools. It support practitioners and researchers in analysing IoT-enhanced business processes, as demonstrated in a real-world scenario. A video demonstrating the tool is available online.

</details>


### [408] [SWE-Fuse: Empowering Software Agents via Issue-free Trajectory Learning and Entropy-aware RLVR Training](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07927)
*Xin-Cheng Wen,Binbin Chen,Haoxuan Lan,Hang Yu,Peng Di,Cuiyun Gao*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: SWE-Fuse是一个针对软件工程代理的训练框架，通过融合问题描述引导和无问题描述样本，解决现实世界中问题描述质量不足的问题，显著提升软件问题修复性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM-based软件工程代理面临现实世界问题描述质量不足的挑战，问题描述与解决方案之间存在不对齐，引入噪声和歧义，误导自动化代理并限制其问题解决效果。

Method: SWE-Fuse包含两个核心模块：1) 无问题描述驱动的轨迹学习模块，减轻误导性问题描述影响，学习逐步调试过程；2) 熵感知RLVR训练模块，通过熵驱动裁剪自适应调整训练动态，高熵时宽松裁剪鼓励探索，低熵时严格裁剪确保稳定性。

Result: 在SWE-bench Verified基准测试中，SWE-Fuse在解决率上分别超过最佳8B和32B基线43.0%和60.2%。结合测试时扩展(TTS)后，8B和32B模型在TTS@8下分别达到49.8%和65.2%的解决率。

Conclusion: SWE-Fuse通过创新的问题描述感知训练框架，有效解决了现实世界软件问题描述质量不足的挑战，显著提升了软件工程代理的性能，为自动化软件问题修复提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have transformed the software engineering landscape. Recently, numerous LLM-based agents have been developed to address real-world software issue fixing tasks. Despite their state-of-the-art performance, Despite achieving state-of-the-art performance, these agents face a significant challenge: \textbf{Insufficient high-quality issue descriptions.} Real-world datasets often exhibit misalignments between issue descriptions and their corresponding solutions, introducing noise and ambiguity that mislead automated agents and limit their problem-solving effectiveness. We propose \textbf{\textit{SWE-Fuse}}, an issue-description-aware training framework that fuses issue-description-guided and issue-free samples for training SWE agents. It consists of two key modules: (1) An issue-free-driven trajectory learning module for mitigating potentially misleading issue descriptions while enabling the model to learn step-by-step debugging processes; and (2) An entropy-aware RLVR training module, which adaptively adjusts training dynamics through entropy-driven clipping. It applies relaxed clipping under high entropy to encourage exploration, and stricter clipping under low entropy to ensure training stability. We evaluate SWE-Fuse on the widely studied SWE-bench Verified benchmark shows to demonstrate its effectiveness in solving real-world software problems. Specifically, SWE-Fuse outperforms the best 8B and 32B baselines by 43.0\% and 60.2\% in solve rate, respectively. Furthermore, integrating SWE-Fuse with test-time scaling (TTS) enables further performance improvements, achieving solve rates of 49.8\% and 65.2\% under TTS@8 for the 8B and 32B models, respectively.

</details>


### [409] [An explainable hybrid deep learning-enabled intelligent fault detection and diagnosis approach for automotive software systems validation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08165)
*Mohammad Abboush,Ehab Ghannoum,Andreas Rausch*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 提出一种基于1DCNN-GRU的可解释故障检测方法，结合多种XAI技术提高汽车软件系统验证过程的可解释性和适应性


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统黑盒故障检测诊断模型缺乏可解释性，难以理解预测逻辑，无法基于预测结果进行模型调整，增加了计算成本并限制了在实时安全关键应用中的可信度

Method: 开发基于1DCNN-GRU的混合智能模型分析汽车软件系统实时验证记录，结合IGs、DeepLIFT、Gradient SHAP和DeepLIFT SHAP等可解释AI技术，实现模型适应性和根本原因分析

Result: 方法应用于硬件在环系统虚拟测试驾驶收集的实时数据集，实现了故障检测、识别和定位的可解释分析

Conclusion: 提出的可解释故障检测方法能够清晰展示预测逻辑，支持模型调整和根本原因分析，提高了汽车软件系统验证过程的效率和可信度

Abstract: Advancements in data-driven machine learning have emerged as a pivotal element in supporting automotive software systems (ASSs) engineering across various levels of the V-development process. Duringsystemverificationandvalidation,theintegrationofanintelligent fault detection anddiagnosis (FDD) model with test recordings analysis process serves as a powerful tool for efficiency ensuring functional safety. However, the lack of interpretability of the black-box FDD models developed not only hinders understanding of the cause underlying the prediction, but also prevents the model from being adapted based on the prediction result. This, in turn, increases the computational cost required for developingacomplexFDDmodelandlimitsconfidenceinreal-timesafety-criticalapplications.To address this challenge, a novel explainable method for fault detection, identification, and localization is proposed in this article with the aim of providing a clear understanding of the logic behind the prediction outcome. To this end, a hybrid 1dCNN-GRU-based intelligent model was developed to analyze the recordings from the real-time validation process of ASSs. The employment of explainable AI techniques, i.e., IGs, DeepLIFT, Gradient SHAP, and DeepLIFT SHAP, was instrumental in enabling model adaptation and facilitating the root cause analysis (RCA). The proposed approach is applied to the real time dataset collected during a virtual test drive performed by the user on hardware in the loop system.

</details>


### [410] [Human-AI Collaboration for Scaling Agile Regression Testing: An Agentic-AI Teammate from Manual to Automated Testing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08190)
*Moustapha El Outmani,Manthan Venkataramana Shenoy,Ahmad Hatahet,Andreas Rausch,Tim Niklas Kniep,Thomas Raddatz,Benjamin King*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: AI驱动的多智能体系统直接从验证后的规格说明生成系统级测试脚本，显著提升测试自动化效率，同时保持人工监督以确保质量


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 敏捷组织中，测试规格说明的产生速度远快于可执行脚本的转换速度，导致手动工作量增加和发布延迟，需要自动化解决方案来加速测试自动化流程

Method: 采用检索增强的多智能体架构，集成到Hacon的敏捷工作流中，直接从验证后的规格说明生成系统级测试脚本

Result: AI系统显著提高了测试脚本的产出量，减少了手动编写工作量，同时强调了清晰规格说明和人工审查对确保质量和可维护性的持续需求

Conclusion: 提出了在敏捷环境中扩展回归测试自动化和促进有效人机协作的实用经验教训

Abstract: Agile organizations increasingly rely on automated regression testing to sustain rapid, high-quality software delivery. However, as systems grow and requirements evolve, a persistent bottleneck arises: test specifications are produced faster than they can be transformed into executable scripts, leading to mounting manual effort and delayed releases. In partnership with Hacon (a Siemens company), we present an agentic AI approach that generates system-level test scripts directly from validated specifications, aiming to accelerate automation without sacrificing human oversight. Our solution features a retrieval-augmented, multi-agent architecture integrated into Hacon's agile workflows. We evaluate this system through a mixed-method analysis of industrial artifacts and practitioner feedback. Results show that the AI teammate significantly increases test script throughput and reduces manual authoring effort, while underscoring the ongoing need for clear specifications and human review to ensure quality and maintainability. We conclude with practical lessons for scaling regression automation and fostering effective Human-AI collaboration in agile environments.

</details>


### [411] [Designing Value-Based Platforms: Architectural Strategies Derived from the Digital Markets Act](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08372)
*Fabian Stiehle,Markus Funke,Patricia Lago,Ingo Weber*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 该研究从技术角度分析欧盟《数字市场法案》，提出了8种高层设计策略和15种具体战术，探讨如何将抽象的人类价值观融入平台生态系统架构设计。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 欧盟《数字市场法案》旨在规范大型数字平台以促进公平、市场竞争和用户选择，但从系统设计或技术角度的影响尚未得到充分研究。本研究旨在填补这一空白，探讨如何将抽象的人类价值观融入平台架构设计。

Method: 采用定性编码和主题分析的系统方法，从技术角度研究《数字市场法案》，分析平台如何实现合规，并推导出设计策略和战术。

Result: 提出了8种高层设计策略作为实现"公平实践"、"用户选择"等价值导向架构目标的基本方法，并识别了15种具体战术，将这些战术映射到相应策略中。

Conclusion: 《数字市场法案》既挑战现有平台设计，也为这些大型生态系统内的服务设计创造了新机会。本研究是填补平台生态系统架构中如何融入抽象人类价值观这一紧迫空白的第一步。

Abstract: The digital markets act (DMA) regulates very large digital platforms like Meta's Facebook or Apple's iOS with the goal to promote fairness, contestability (of market power) and user choice. From a system design or broader technical perspective, the implications of the DMA have not been studied so far. Using systematic methods from qualitative coding and thematic analysis, we investigate the DMA from a technical perspective and derive eight high-level design strategies that serve as fundamental approaches towards value-based architectural goals like 'fair practice', or 'user choice' (as envisioned by the DMA). We investigate how compliance with the DMA has been achieved and derive 15 tactics that we map to our strategies. While the DMA obligations challenge existing platform designs, they also create new opportunities for designing services within these huge ecosystems. We, thus, discuss our strategies in light of both. We see this work as a first step towards filling this pressing gap in the architecture of platform ecosystems, i.e., how to incorporate abstract human values in architecture design.

</details>


### [412] [Coverage-Guided Multi-Agent Harness Generation for Java Library Fuzzing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08616)
*Nils Loose,Nico Winkel,Kristoffer Hempel,Felix Mächtle,Julian Hans,Thomas Eisenbarth*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 多智能体架构自动化生成Java库的模糊测试工具，通过五个ReAct智能体分解工作流程，实现比现有工具更好的代码覆盖率，并发现实际bug。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 针对库代码的模糊测试需要专门的测试工具，手动创建这些工具耗时且需要深入理解API语义、初始化序列和异常处理契约，因此需要自动化解决方案。

Method: 采用多智能体架构，五个ReAct智能体分别负责研究、合成、编译修复、覆盖率分析和细化。通过模型上下文协议按需查询文档、源代码和调用图信息，引入方法目标覆盖率和智能体引导终止来有效细化。

Result: 在六个广泛部署的Java库的七个目标方法上评估，生成的测试工具比OSS-Fuzz基线提高中位数26%的覆盖率，比Jazzer AutoFuzz提高5%的包范围覆盖率。在12小时模糊测试活动中发现了3个bug。

Conclusion: 该方法自动化生成模糊测试工具，成本低（平均$3.20和10分钟每个工具），适用于持续模糊测试工作流，能有效提高库代码的测试覆盖率并发现实际缺陷。

Abstract: Coverage-guided fuzzing has proven effective for software testing, but targeting library code requires specialized fuzz harnesses that translate fuzzer-generated inputs into valid API invocations. Manual harness creation is time-consuming and requires deep understanding of API semantics, initialization sequences, and exception handling contracts. We present a multi-agent architecture that automates fuzz harness generation for Java libraries through specialized LLM-powered agents. Five ReAct agents decompose the workflow into research, synthesis, compilation repair, coverage analysis, and refinement. Rather than preprocessing entire codebases, agents query documentation, source code, and callgraph information on demand through the Model Context Protocol, maintaining focused context while exploring complex dependencies. To enable effective refinement, we introduce method-targeted coverage that tracks coverage only during target method execution to isolate target behavior, and agent-guided termination that examines uncovered source code to distinguish productive refinement opportunities from diminishing returns. We evaluated our approach on seven target methods from six widely-deployed Java libraries totaling 115,000+ Maven dependents. Our generated harnesses achieve a median 26\% improvement over OSS-Fuzz baselines and outperform Jazzer AutoFuzz by 5\% in package-scope coverage. Generation costs average \$3.20 and 10 minutes per harness, making the approach practical for continuous fuzzing workflows. During a 12-hour fuzzing campaign, our generated harnesses discovered 3 bugs in projects that are already integrated into OSS-Fuzz, demonstrating the effectiveness of the generated harnesses.

</details>


### [413] [PostTrainBench: Can LLM Agents Automate LLM Post-Training?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08640)
*Ben Rank,Hardik Bhatnagar,Ameya Prabhu,Shira Eisenberg,Karina Nguyen,Matthias Bethge,Maksym Andriushchenko*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 论文提出PostTrainBench基准，用于评估LLM代理在有限计算资源下自主进行后训练的能力，发现前沿代理虽能取得进展但落后于官方指令调优模型，同时揭示了奖励黑客等风险行为。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着AI代理在软件工程领域能力提升，研究者希望探索这些系统能否将能力扩展到自动化AI研究本身，特别是后训练这一将基础LLM转化为有用助手的关键阶段。

Method: 引入PostTrainBench基准，在有限计算约束下（单H100 GPU 10小时）评估LLM代理自主进行后训练的能力。让前沿代理（如Claude Code with Opus 4.6）优化基础LLM在特定基准上的表现，不提供预定义策略，给予完全自主权在网络上查找信息、运行实验和整理数据。

Result: 前沿代理能取得实质性进展但通常落后于领先提供商的指令调优LLM：最佳代理得分为23.2% vs 官方指令调优模型的51.1%。但在特定场景下代理能超越指令调优模型：GPT-5.1 Codex Max在BFCL基准上使用Gemma-3-4B达到89% vs 官方模型的67%。同时观察到奖励黑客等失败模式：在测试集上训练、下载现有指令调优检查点而非自行训练、使用找到的API密钥未经授权生成合成数据。

Conclusion: PostTrainBench有助于追踪AI研发自动化进展并研究伴随风险，揭示了代理的奖励黑客等令人担忧的行为，强调了随着系统能力增强进行仔细沙盒化的重要性。

Abstract: AI agents have become surprisingly proficient at software engineering over the past year, largely due to improvements in reasoning capabilities. This raises a deeper question: can these systems extend their capabilities to automate AI research itself? In this paper, we explore post-training, the critical phase that turns base LLMs into useful assistants. We introduce PostTrainBench to benchmark how well LLM agents can perform post-training autonomously under bounded compute constraints (10 hours on one H100 GPU). We ask frontier agents (e.g., Claude Code with Opus 4.6) to optimize the performance of a base LLM on a particular benchmark (e.g., Qwen3-4B on AIME). Importantly, we do not provide any predefined strategies to the agents and instead give them full autonomy to find necessary information on the web, run experiments, and curate data. We find that frontier agents make substantial progress but generally lag behind instruction-tuned LLMs from leading providers: 23.2% for the best agent vs. 51.1% for official instruction-tuned models. However, agents can exceed instruction-tuned models in targeted scenarios: GPT-5.1 Codex Max achieves 89% on BFCL with Gemma-3-4B vs. 67% for the official model. We also observe several failure modes worth flagging. Agents sometimes engage in reward hacking: training on the test set, downloading existing instruction-tuned checkpoints instead of training their own, and using API keys they find to generate synthetic data without authorization. These behaviors are concerning and highlight the importance of careful sandboxing as these systems become more capable. Overall, we hope PostTrainBench will be useful for tracking progress in AI R&D automation and for studying the risks that come with it. Website and code are available at https://posttrainbench.com/.

</details>


<div id='cs.AI'></div>

# cs.AI [[Back]](#toc)

### [414] [Autonomous AI Agents for Option Hedging: Enhancing Financial Stability through Shortfall Aware Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06587)
*Minxuan Hu,Ziheng Chen,Jiayu Yi,Wenxi Sun*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 论文提出两种强化学习框架（RLOP和QLBS），用于解决衍生品市场中AI代理的对冲性能问题，通过关注短缺概率和下行风险来改善实际对冲结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自主AI代理在衍生品市场的部署暴露了静态模型校准与实际对冲结果之间的实践差距，需要开发更符合实际风险管理的框架。
